title: Top Sports Betting Stocks for Q1 2022
text: These are the sports betting stocks with the best value, fastest growth, and most momentum for Q1 2022.

title: BetMGM Retail Sportsbook Officially Opens at Nationals Park in Washington, D.C.
text: WASHINGTON, Jan. 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- BetMGM and the Washington Nationals announced today the opening of the first retail sportsbook connected to a Major League Baseball stadium. The BetMGM Sportsbook at Nationals Park is open year-round, providing sports fans an innovative entertainment destination to watch and wager on games.

title: MGM Resorts International: Why Buying The Stock Is Not Gambling Your Money Away
text: MGM Resorts International has already recuperated from its pre-pandemic price, rising to its current $40.62 per share from $31.39 on February 17, 2020. MGM and its competitors were negatively affected by the Covid-19 pandemic in their physical properties.

title: BETMGM LAUNCHES MOBILE SPORTS BETTING IN LOUISIANA
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J.  , Jan. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- BetMGM, a leading sports betting and iGaming operator, today launched its online sports betting platform in Louisiana, giving customers access to a wide variety of betting options as well as experiences at MGM Resorts' Beau Rivage Resort & Casino in Mississippi.

title: MGM Resorts International Earns Top Score in Human Rights Campaign Foundation's 2022 Corporate Equality Index
text: LAS VEGAS,, Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- MGM Resorts International proudly announced that it received a score of 100 on the Human Rights Campaign Foundation's 2022 Corporate Equality Index, the nation's foremost benchmarking survey and report measuring corporate policies and practices related to LGBTQ+ workplace equality. MGM Resorts joins the ranks of over 840 major U.S. businesses that also earned top marks this year.

title: MGM Gaining Ground On DraftKings, FanDuel In Online Sports Betting; Sector Reports Weak December Numbers
text: Online gaming stocks have taken a big hit in recent months, and Bank of America analyst Shaun Kelley said Monday that the U.S. online sports betting market had a surprisingly weak month in December. Kelley said December online sports betting (OSB) gross gaming revenue (GGR) came in at an annual run rate of just $180 million, down 45% month-over-month.

title: MGM RESORTS AND ENTAIN ANNOUNCE BETMGM UPDATE RELEASE DATE
text: LAS VEGAS, Jan. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- BetMGM, LLC ("BetMGM"), one of the leading sports betting and iGaming operators across the U.S., jointly owned by MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) ("MGM Resorts") and Entain plc (LSE: ENT) ("Entain"), will release an update before the market opens on Wednesday, January 19, 2022 at approximately 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

title: BETMGM TO LAUNCH MOBILE SPORTS BETTING IN NEW YORK MONDAY, JANUARY 17
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J. , Jan. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- BetMGM today announced that the company will launch its online sportsbook in New York on Monday, Jan. 17.

title: Speculating On MGM Resorts? This Stock Could Provide Better Gains
text: The shares of MGM Resorts have gained $6.5 billion in market capitalization over February 2020 levels assisted by its sports betting application BetMGM and a possibility of a favorable regulatory outcome in Macau. The shares of Penn National Gaming have gained $2.1 billion in market capitalization.

title: MGM Resorts (MGM) Reimagines Loyalty Program, Boosts Offerings
text: MGM Resorts (MGM) reimagines its loyalty rewards program, thereby unlocking earning and redemption options for both gaming and non-gaming guests alike.

title: MGM RESORTS REIMAGINES LOYALTY REWARDS PROGRAM WITH NEW NAME, NEW WAYS TO EARN FOR BOTH GAMING AND NON-GAMING SPEND AND ENHANCED GUEST EXPERIENCES
text: LAS VEGAS , Jan. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- MGM Resorts is rolling out its reimagined loyalty rewards program, MGM Rewards, on February 1, unlocking unprecedented access for both gaming and non-gaming guests to the Company's 20+ premier destinations across the country, offering more ways to earn and a host of exciting new benefits.   For the first time, non-gaming customers will join their gaming counterparts and have the benefit of earning a currency - MGM Rewards Points - redeemable for complimentary food and beverage, entertainment, hotel stays and more.
